title: Wave-2 hand drafting pools
notes: Curated add-card pools for the pre-run Hand draft (Wave 2 pillar 2). The engine builds a four-card reveal from `universal` + `hands.<hand_id>`, filtered to cards that resolve in the merged action tableau at the host location (a card with available_in_locations must list the host; cards without the field are universal). Universal entries are core-tableau verbs so they resolve in every arcana. Per-hand entries are arcana-deck cards that only resolve when that hand is playing its home arcana — they filter out silently elsewhere. Hands without a pool here draft from the universal pool only; Wave-2 hand pools are a data pass for later.
